name: Plain Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the well-beaten egg.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients (baking powder, salt, and flour) alternately with the milk.
4. Fill each muffin tin about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at a moderate temperature in an oven.
